startPoint.en: Talk to Burntmeat in the kitchen of the Troll Stronghold. (via → )

items.name: Bucket
items.display: Bucket (may be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Climbing Boots
items.display: Climbing Boots or rock climbing boots or Trollheim teleport

items.name: Rake
items.display: Rake (can't be on the tool belt, may be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Seed dibber
items.display: Seed dibber (can't be on the tool belt, may be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Spade
items.display: Spade (can't be on the tool belt, may be obtained during the quest)

items.name: Plant cure
items.display: Plant cure (or an additional supercompost; Cure Plant from the Lunar Spellbook will not work, may be obtained during the quest)

rewards.display: 5,000 experience (as well as 495 more, when My Arm harvests the goutweed)

rewards.name: Herb patch (Trollheim)
rewards.display: Access to a disease-free herb patch on top of the Troll Stronghold.

rewards.name: Dominion Tower
rewards.display: Giant Roc is unlocked in Dominion Tower.

text.en: Go to the Troll Stronghold, head south then downstairs into the kitchen.
Speak to Burntmeat. (opciones de chat: Accept • 2 Alright, I'll lend him a hand.)
Talk to My Arm, east of Burntmeat.
Travel to Burthorpe and head north-west past Troll Invasion.
Climb the rocks and head east past the thrower trolls to reach the Death Plateau.
Search the cooking pot to obtain a .
If you receive the message "... but you can't reach very far into it.", use an empty bucket on the cooking pot.
Return to the Troll Stronghold kitchen and speak to My Arm.
Once on the surface, talk to him near the farming patch.
Read the he gives you, then talk to him again.
Use the 3 buckets of and 7 buckets of on the soil patch.
Talk to My Arm for a cutscene. (opciones de chat: 1 This is My Arm. We'd like to go to Karamja.)
Talk to Captain Barnaby if you find yourself in Ardougne.
Talk to My Arm south-east of the Karamja lodestone. He is east of Jiminua's Jungle Store.
Talk to Murcaily, guarding the tree grove north-east of Tai Bwo Wannai. (opciones de chat: 1 A troll called My Arm wants a favour...)
A cutscene will play. Go through the dialogue.
Talk to My Arm south-east of the Karamja lodestone. Continue through the dialogue while on the boat.
Return to the roof of the Troll Stronghold where the soil patch was.
If you don't already have the farming tools, right-click talk to the Tool Leprechaun to buy some. (opciones de chat: 4 Would you like to trade?)
Talk to My Arm.
Use the following items on him in order:
(twice as he breaks it)
Pick up and use the on the , give him the assembled rake again.
(optional but recommended). Without supercompost, the patch may become diseased and require curing. Regular compost and ultracompost have no effect.
If the patch becomes diseased, a
Defeat the Baby Roc after the cutscene.
Make sure to have a spade or buy one from the tool leprechaun now, to avoid any extra steps after the next cutscene.
Talk to My Arm.
Defeat the Giant Roc that appears after the cutscene.
Talk to My Arm.
Use a on him.
If needed, you can get the leprechaun to come back by climbing the ladder down and up again.
Return to Burntmeat in the stronghold's kitchen and talk to him.
Return to My Arm and speak with him.
Quest complete!
